speaker: internal
text: Hey Priya it's Daniel. You got a sec?

speaker: external
text: Yeah hey Daniel. Sure what's up.

speaker: internal
text: Just wanted to check in on how the rollout's been going.

speaker: external
text: It's been okay. We've gotten three of the warehouses on. But the Phoenix one is dragging.

speaker: external
text: Honestly the team there is pretty checked out. They're still emailing inventory counts in spreadsheets and our ops manager hasn't pushed them to switch.

speaker: internal
text: That makes sense. We have a few customers who hit that exact pattern. The rollout stalls when there isn't a champion at the site. Would it help if I joined a 30-minute call with the Phoenix lead?

speaker: external
text: That could actually help. Although honestly I'm starting to wonder if the price is right for what we're getting out of it. Three sites in nine months isn't great.

speaker: internal
text: I hear you. Let me put together a usage report so we can see exactly where the value is landing. Then we can decide whether the plan tier still makes sense.

speaker: external
text: Sure. And between you and me Brightline is starting to look at us. So I'd like to get this turned around before our renewal in March.

speaker: internal
text: Got it. I'll have that report to you by Thursday and we'll set up the Phoenix call next week.

speaker: internal
text: Talk to you Friday. Have a good one.
